It's so interesting to see this! This is the first video of the basic style Wifies does now, in early 2021, even though he's taken a while to settle on that style. It's changed a lot from then to now of course, but as far as I can tell, this is the first video on his channel with the general idea. Also, I can tell he has had quite a growth spurt between now and then, because _man_ his voice is a lot different. Something that has not changed a bit though, is that he still does the "Peace Out" at the end! *:D* It's just all so refreshing, and _I love it!_

If it doesn't work, its either a bug or you've done it wrong. (Note the fact that the first left repeater has a two-tick delay)
In case you still don't understand the mechanic, the dropper goes into the hopper, of which feeds back into the dropper.
However, for the split second that one of the items is in the dropper, the comparator gives a signal. This signal has a strength of either 1 or 3, depending on the stackable or unstackable item respectively. 


In the signal strength of one, it goes to the first repeater and goes to the left lamp.
In the signal strength of three, both repeaters are activated. The repeater on the right side powers the sticky piston and extends it so the lamp on the left side doesn't receive power, but the right lamp does.
